problem.summary: Overlap all-gather of remote shards with local compute over already available tensor-parallel blocks.
outputs: gathered tensor or consumed partial outputs
constraints: Template-only; timeline evidence is required before claiming overlap
Record gather order, buffer aliasing, and whether consumer waits on full tensor
Compare full all-gather then compute versus pipelined consume

verification.method: Implement the baseline, optimized candidate, and CPU or strongest-library oracle where applicable; compare outputs before timing claims.

curation.notes: Promoted from the v2 extension backlog as wave 2. No performance, correctness, or profiler evidence is claimed yet.
